youtube_title: Japan Beat England — Now Van Dijk Stands in Their Way | Netherlands vs Japan World Cup 2026 Preview
youtube_description: Japan stunned England 1-0 at Wembley in March 2026 — their first win over the Three Lions ever, Kaoru Mitoma with the goal — and arrive at the World Cup on a five-game winning streak. Tonight they open Group F against Virgil van Dijk's Netherlands in what's likely Van Dijk's final World Cup. Giant-killers vs a top-eight giant. Upset alert? Generated graphics + voiceover — no broadcast footage. #WorldCup2026
